subject: Will you STAND WITH RAND in New Hampshire?

body:
Corky Messner just got a HUGE endorsement. Have you heard? Read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d3fd7bdb86043f4f/9b705d7bc096e7c5c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter,
Exciting news! I’m very pleased to let you know that my friend Corky Messner has just been endorsed by Sen. Rand Paul in his bid to become our next U.S. Senator in New Hampshire.
I’ve worked closely with Senator Paul in the past as his presidential campaign’s Co-Chair in New Hampshire, so I know that he doesn’t make these calls lightly.
**But Corky is exactly the kind of Constitutional Conservative that we need right now**.
Corky embodies New Hampshire’s “Live Free or Die” spirit of independence and liberty, and Rand is glad to have a candidate like him to run against Jeanne Shaheen and get her out of office.
It’s going to be a tough race, and we’re going to need all the help we can get.
**[Will you STAND WITH RAND today by supporting Corky’s campaign with a donation of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, or what you can?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d3fd7bdb86043f4f/adaff605ae67a541c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d3fd7bdb86043f4f/50c212e8a115c88ec3d6b838967d376c/33153) Here’s what Senator Paul had to say about Corky: _Corky Messner is an outsider who understands the need for more leaders who will buck the status quo and defend the Constitution. He’s a businessman who knows how important it is to get our debt and deficit under control and our spending in check. He’s a veteran who has served our country honorably and believes, like President Trump and I do, that we must end the endless wars and take care of our veterans, who have sacrificed so much._ Rand is a proven warrior for personal liberty and individual freedoms, and he knows what it’s going to take to Keep America Great.

It’s going to take someone like Corky winning this seat in the Granite State.

**[Will you help us take back this seat for the GOP and keep our majority in the Senate?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d3fd7bdb86043f4f/4b1d6411cbfe2ce0c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**

Corky has great momentum, and we need to keep it going!

I hope I can count on you.

Thanks for your support,
Victoria Sullivan
Former NH Co-Chair, Rand Paul for President **[Donate $5 today to STAND WITH RAND for Corky>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d3fd7bdb86043f4f/082b5dc61cd058abc3d6b838967d376c/33153)**

| Dear Friend,

You may have missed that on Election Day, Donald Trump endorsed Jackie Walorski, stating: "Jackie is doing an incredible job for Indiana.” Jackie then tweeted proudly that she is grateful to receive Donald Trump’s “complete and total endorsement.”

| Yesterday, just one day after Jackie proudly accepted Trump’s endorsement and on the heels of our primary election here in Indiana, Former Secretary of Defense James Mattis said the following:
> “Donald Trump is the first president in my lifetime who does not try to unite the American people– does not even pretend to try. Instead, he tries to divide us... We must reject and hold accountable those in office who would make a mockery of our Constitution.”
Additionally, retired four-star Marine Corps General John Allen said that Donald Trump’s recent threat to use the military on protestors “...may well signal the beginning of the end of the American experiment."

---
| | | Patriot,

National Democrats are all in on trying to win another congressional seat in Kansas, and they have their eyes fixed on the 2nd district. First, we saw **Kathleen Sebelius** sending out fundraising emails for our Democrat opponent. Then the Democrat nominee was endorsed by **Elizabeth Warren**. Next **Amy Klobuchar** hosted a fundraiser for her. Now she's been endorsed by **Pete Buttigieg** who will be hosting a fundraiser for her next week.

**The Mayor of Topeka is THE chosen candidate of the leftist Democrats and socialists in Washington D.C.** They will do everything they can to get her elected.
---
| **And it's up to us to do everything we can to keep that from happening.**

We need your help to make sure the Democrats don't take over another seat in Kansas. We cannot afford for that to happen or it will be impossible for Republicans to take back the House. [Will you pitch in to help us Take Back the House from Nancy Pelosi?](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=903fdfeb13&e=1050d051da)

Nancy Pelosi has already said publicly that [she's targeting the 2nd congressional district](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=03a19f6142&e=1050d051da) because our current congressman is a "weak Republican" who is "distracted by scandals".
---
| **We need a Republican nominee who can win the general election, and Jake LaTurner is the man for the job. **

We don't need coastal liberals telling Kansans what to do. Jake LaTurner has a proven track record of leading on the issues that matter to Kansans. _**That’s why you see trusted groups like Kansas Farm Bureau endorsing Jake, while coastal liberals support our opponent.**_

Donate to our campaign to send a conservative to Congress and help us send a message to the Democrats that we don't want anything to do with their liberal agenda here in Kansas. Anything helps: [$100, $50, or even $25.](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=b33ead98f3&e=1050d051da)

Yours in the fight,

Team LaTurner

name: My Faith Votes
subject: Jesus is the only answer
body:
| | Peter, We must ask the question: why can thousands of people protest in the streets but in places like California church gatherings cannot exceed 100 people? No one is saying that there should not be justice for what happened to George Floyd or that Americans should not have the right to protest. But certain states will not allow funerals or gatherings to be able to worship, pray, and grieve in our churches for the most recent national chaos. **The only answer to bring healing to people and our nation is faith and our hope found in Jesus.** Hebrews 10:25 says, “Do not give up meeting together, as some are in the habit of doing, but encouraging one another--and all the more as you see the Day approaching.” We need more faith, more open churches, not less. This weekend, we hope the resources below will encourage you. You can take action to keep church essential in America and understand the Supreme Court’s latest ruling that impacts this First Amendment right. Together let’s pray for justice to be served, and for God to bring healing to every community in our country. | [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iTg_TE5JwVM5vsmCD7Z07Vv1EDLsLLKkTSS6G2jYt2yyuWuCD-mtDIz7a_RhfxirxQGvwsA-LwxpP7FQwvDrQHQtTXy7pPX6jyuDyo6UMXZA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200606com01&n=1) | [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvNBq3rXsmSnye1T5ILYFg4kK1GI2iNGlkbMCvQY8jP3H1P7kI1bSpP3O7hVdyKEPoQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200606com01&n=2)

subject: Five Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want You to Miss
body:
May Sees Biggest Jobs Increase Ever of 2.5 Million as Economy Starts to Recover from Coronavirus | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7bd96882a6&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**May Sees Biggest Jobs Increase Ever of 2.5 Million as Economy Starts to Recover from Coronavirus**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c01ead858f&e=3ee4985eea)
-CNBC
“Employment stunningly rose by 2.5 million in May and the jobless rate declined to 13.3%, according to data Friday from the Labor Department that was far better than economists had been expecting and indicated that an economic turnaround could be close at hand,” Jeff Cox reports.

🎬 **President Trump:** [The world’s greatest economy is roaring back!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9a73cc0b5b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**15 People Died in the Protests and Riots Following George Floyd’s Death. Here’s Who They Are**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=81c7850558&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Daily Caller_
“Some have downplayed the looting and violence. Politicians, along with sympathetic members of the national media, lined up to apologize or justify the destruction,” Marlo Safi writes. “But the violence didn’t end with buildings reduced to ashes or broken windows. Lives can’t be replaced.”

🎬 **President Trump** : **[Every American must receive equal treatment under the law](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cdcb82da42&e=3ee4985eea "https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1268930044564516871")**
---
|
---
| [**The Media Are Lying To You About Everything, Including The Riots**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=91d61fbd31&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Federalist_
“In recent days we’ve heard a steady drumbeat of lies, distortions, and disingenuousness from the mainstream media about almost every aspect of the unrest now gripping American cities. The deceit is almost too pervasive and amorphous to describe,” John Daniel Davidson writes.

**MORE:** [“The lying about Donald Trump is now completely out of control”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a7fabc51ca&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Trump, HBCUs and Progress**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1592da4b9e&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Townhall_
“As both of us can attest, historically Black colleges and universities (HBCU) provide a vital path for young African-Americans to reach the true heights of their potential,” Ken Blackwell and Herman Cain write. “The scale and duration of President Trump’s commitment to HBCUs is a story often ignored in the popular press, but it fits neatly within the framework of his governing philosophy.”

**🎬****Scott Turner:** [We must stand together in unity ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=59de14efa1&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**How Financial Institutions Can Help America Heal**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9e6f1e2803&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Wall Street Journal_
“I am all too familiar with the heartbreak and pain that so many in the black community experience as they see such events play out repeatedly,” writes Rodney Hood. “President Trump appointed me the first African-American to lead a federal banking regulatory agency, the National Credit Union Administration . . . Since I assumed the chairmanship last year, much of my focus has been on building and reinforcing places that have fallen behind.”
---

body:
**[Web version](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/m/1/49109489/02-b20158-6fc6d92381004afea3635e1c675f60f7/80/64/f63981d1-c95d-478b-b792-b2eb61d5470b)** This week, we launched the Second Opinion Project. We asked respected doctors across the nation for their opinions on the dangers and unintended consequences of Covid-19 lockdowns and restrictions. The “experts” prescribed a regimen that is still destroying lives and livelihoods and it is time for the people to demand a second opinion. And there are some Governors and Mayors who continue to insist on depriving Americans of their God-given rights, despite the evidence and data we now have about COVID-19. That’s why we sent a letter to President Trump encouraging him to view the stories of countless doctors explaining why we should never again go into lockdowns like the one's we've seen. You can view the interviews and sign the petition at [www.secondopinionproject.com](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTU4LTZmYzZkOTIzODEwMDRhZmVhMzYzNWUxYzY3NWY2MGY3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2Vjb25kb3BpbmlvbnByb2plY3QuY29tP21pZD00MjE0NyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=v1DAw9C2sD00NYh0m-SImg). The doctors we are working with for the Second Opinion Project support revising the guidelines because right now, they are onerous, unworkable, and unnecessary. Please [read and sign the letter](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTU4LTZmYzZkOTIzODEwMDRhZmVhMzYzNWUxYzY3NWY2MGY3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTI%3A%3AaHR0cDovL2xuay50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy9tLzEvNDkxMDk0ODkvMDItYjIwMTU3LTc2NmFjOTVlNWFhZDQxOTliODZiMWUzNTBmZjI2ZDY0Lzg5LzkyMC8zNTY1ODI4OS1mYTRjLTQ5NjEtOGU5ZC1mZGI0ZjZkYzRkMDE_bWlkPTQyMTQ3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=JBjWjDGS61Rw1yGQesnGPA), and then share it with others.
|
---
The May jobs report was just released and much to Democrats and the Mainstream Media's shock – their predictions of doom and gloom were wrong.

Again, supposed “experts” predicted that the jobs report would show a loss of over 7.5 million jobs, instead it showed 2.5 million jobs were added. On top of that, the unemployment rate fell to 13.3%.

I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I had 11 brothers and sisters, and I grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. But, from there, I went on to earn a college degree, and worked my way up to serving as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, I have the chance to become the first black senator this state has _ever_ elected.
But the truth is, the opportunities that made my journey possible - from Kayton Homes to Dr. King's pulpit - are growing further and further out of reach for too many people across this country. I'm running for Senate to change that, but I can't win without help of grassroots supporters like you.

Friend,

We won’t mince words — our economy has been suffering as a result of COVID-19 and social distancing.

_There’s a long hill to climb until we’re back on top, but we need to do everything we can to re-open Main Streets across the country._

Restoring our economy starts with getting Americans safely back to work. It’s a crucial first step towards making businesses across the country whole again.
[**Become a citizen co-sponsor of the back-to-work bonus**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=43812fb0dc224a05a0bae44f2f4f7bd9&_e=Ktc8ajF1nxOY9bTFaHhBWFiBtuE_LOHIH_jLAhK8RUelJQzGJInyk8Yh1OHyRFffTr9nYF7VVBZVRD66TzyOGiUUDd_aWwNHyDIYYbfsrrT65Hq178Lt5gSmuGrlxIn8c9-5CyL9IGsAyqVEptTiGtrbs3wXK4KhJNlCvRe0NnKvfV8hxlx8dVkp6ktBnOKrBPasUtCBmoDPB0YiwgXJzFHqPwLDHNp5T53D1h1IRFXVO_E7BZFnomKmoUCrSbXn381wF6gV5pJHNMKoW2okPUuWfmjahLjuHI-f_Ts5NlAmBr6UOf9oQsSqBPHrxrRAvVTCLrqFrqO3PBd_Gl8FvhAQQGOIfHucl3brC1XJqCHScSxzFUOdx79riZJNeieHmrmZMWi2Ms8q1xZuXrvF50P5yPBApQW_xPdd5h3EqSCVNvp93a60jOcy_oW-t61Rnuoj9H9H8cejZ8rzEPoCjFXwUVdpCgYFe0jRYvxB-38%3D)
That’s why Darin is co-sponsoring Rep. Kevin Brady’s back-to-work bonus proposal — legislation that supports American workers and incentivizes them to return to the workplace.

This legislation would allow American workers to keep up to 2 weeks of unemployment benefits if they accept a job offer. It’s a common-sense proposal that provides relief to our workforce while accelerating the recovery of our local businesses.
[**Become a citizen co-sponsor of the back-to-work bonus**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=43812fb0dc224a05a0bae44f2f4f7bd9&_e=Ktc8ajF1nxOY9bTFaHhBWFiBtuE_LOHIH_jLAhK8RUelJQzGJInyk8Yh1OHyRFffTr9nYF7VVBZVRD66TzyOGiUUDd_aWwNHyDIYYbfsrrT65Hq178Lt5gSmuGrlxIn8c9-5CyL9IGsAyqVEptTiGtrbs3wXK4KhJNlCvRe0NnKvfV8hxlx8dVkp6ktBnOKrBPasUtCBmoDPB0YiwgXJzFHqPwLDHNp5T53D1h1IRFXVO_E7BZFnomKmoUCrSbXn381wF6gV5pJHNMKoW2okPaO4MOfrigzkII092X84VJclrrCkZYiHTqIWxfyx5U-QGKUdALOm8Z28FwrPgBcSyun40OvPaL1kCnJx0DF7r33FH5zHDMH1VfV4w_QObmegMaF8GnwFIR5SmuirunmjaAN4Vr4-NlU8cRRY4hLKIH2eGdO07KTh6qYo9i7Mggdll0cbtdOU2QqlWcXYOWEeNYGKQkCOM9u-l6yAjW6rdqU%3D)
Friend, this is exactly the kind of Main Street-first legislation we need to help restore our economy.

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Hope
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
I have struggled to come to terms with the latest examples of the
injustice of America. The murders of George Floyd, Breonna Taylor, Ahmaud
Arbery — and so many more killed by those who were sworn to serve and
protect them — beg the question, can we ever become the country we’ve told
ourselves, and the rest of the world, that we are? A country where all are
equal under law? A just country?

This is what I was thinking about as I addressed the Texas Democratic
Convention today. How do we make it? What cause do we have for hope in
these very dark days of injustice, revealed not only by police brutality,
but by the disproportionate burden that African Americans, Native
Americans and Latinos have borne in fighting the pandemic and its economic
consequences?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42576?t=1001&akid=92802%2E444211%2Eux1TNW ]Watch the full speech >>

The answer, in part, is our willingness to band together to change the
status quo of our government, from the courthouse, to the State House to
the White House. Grieving and protesting are essential, but we must also
take political action. Register to vote in record numbers, vote in record
numbers, and elect representatives who will focus on and implement
policies of reform and justice in record numbers.

I have hope because we are not impotent in the face of this injustice.

This past Monday more than 2,500 people signed up for our phone bank to
reach unregistered voters in Texas and help them register to vote. We made
over 210,000 phone calls. If we keep this up, we will help bring hundreds
of thousands of new voters into this next election. They are the ones who
will elect majorities to their commissioners courts and city councils that
will reform local police forces and ensure more equitable investment in
their communities. They are the voters who will elect a Democratic
majority to the Texas Legislature for the first time in 20 years - a
majority that will fight to change decades of racial gerrymandering and
work for criminal justice reform.

And they are the ones, if we meet our goals of registering every likely
Democrat in this state, who will award our 38 electoral votes to the
Democratic nominee for President for the first time since 1976. That will
be seismic. And it will guarantee, unlike anything else or any other
state, that Donald Trump will not serve another term in office. Joe Biden
will be our next President and with the help of every single one of us
(supporting him and holding him accountable) he will help to usher in an
era of true justice in this country.

This kind of action — doing the hard work that will decide the future of
our state and country — gives me hope.

It is the antidote to despair and the key to victory.

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1002&akid=92802%2E444211%2Eux1TNW

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA

name: Team Bennet
subject: Words are not enough. We must take action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17774474/205947816/721416609?refcode=footer&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzhmNGEyYi01MWE4LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OpjCAknqf5SmJ6z_81ptVcR5V3kW1GuLNvXkoF9ooe4=)
| | Friends,

This is a time of reckoning in our country.

We are facing a global pandemic that has swept through our communities, disproportionately affecting people of color.

We are witnessing astounding numbers of lost jobs and shuttered businesses, threatening the economic stability of millions of Americans.

And we are experiencing the struggle for racial justice, as the abhorrent killings of George Floyd, Ahmaud Arbery, Breonna Taylor, and too many other black Americans have shed light yet again on the systemic oppression and racism that plagues every aspect of our society.

Now is a time for action—in our homes, in our communities, and in Congress. One way we can all take action today is to donate to an organization fighting for justice.

The NAACP Legal Defense and Education Fund uses litigation, advocacy, and public education to seek structural change in our country. Their goals include expanding our democracy and achieving racial justice—both of which are sorely needed in our country today.

[We know this is a tough financial time for many Americans, but if you’re in a position to chip in, this is an organization deserving of our help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17774475/205947817/149037270?donate_page_KEY=15780&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzhmNGEyYi01MWE4LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OpjCAknqf5SmJ6z_81ptVcR5V3kW1GuLNvXkoF9ooe4=&emci=b39fd669-47a8-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=d78f4a2b-51a8-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=1295540)

[If you’re able, can you make a donation of $10, or whatever you can, to the NAACP’s Legal Defense Fund?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17774476/205947818/149037270?donate_page_KEY=15780&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzhmNGEyYi01MWE4LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OpjCAknqf5SmJ6z_81ptVcR5V3kW1GuLNvXkoF9ooe4=&emci=b39fd669-47a8-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=d78f4a2b-51a8-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=1295540)

| | [DONATE TO THE NAACP LDF >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17774477/205947819/149037270?donate_page_KEY=15780&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzhmNGEyYi01MWE4LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OpjCAknqf5SmJ6z_81ptVcR5V3kW1GuLNvXkoF9ooe4=&emci=b39fd669-47a8-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=d78f4a2b-51a8-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=1295540)
---
**Let’s not stop there.** We can all do more to educate ourselves, have uncomfortable and challenging conversations with our friends and families, sign petitions for change, and register our neighbors to vote.

This is a fight for racial justice, criminal justice reform, education equality, and voting rights. It’s a fight for the future of our country—a future that is up to the work all of us commit to do, each and every day.

In solidarity,

Team Bennet

name: Cory Booker
subject: The legislation I'm drafting
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
body:
|
#
Friend, It is a time of profound upheaval and moral reckoning for our country. At the core of all this is an inspiring activation of Americans of all races coming together to call for long overdue systemic change, spurred by the disturbing and unjust murder of George Floyd by Minneapolis police officers. People are speaking out and standing up not only for George Floyd, but for Breonna Taylor. Ahmaud Arbery. Tony McDade. Sandra Bland. Eric Garner. Trayvon Martin. Mike Brown. Tamir Rice. Freddie Gray. Philando Castile. Alton Sterling. Terence Crutcher. Oscar Grant. And countless more people whose names we don't know. **Persistent, unchecked bias in policing and a complete lack of accountability is wreaking havoc on the Black community. It has been for decades upon decades.** The truth is there's no one policy change that will fix this issue immediately. We need a comprehensive set of reforms that will improve police training and practices, and ensure greater accountability and transparency. **That's why I'm teaming up with Kamala Harris and members of the Congressional Black Caucus to draft legislation to reform policing in our country.** We'll have more details to announce in the days ahead, but people across this country are rightfully angry because time and again, their voices have gone unheard. Their desperate calls for change have been dismissed. Their heartbreak and trauma have been bottled up. And the list of Black and brown lives cut short has only grown. I know, I feel it too. _Our outrage must lead to real change._ I'm working tirelessly for that here in Washington -- and I thank you for all that you are doing to rise to this momentous occasion and fight for justice, together. Cory _P.S. I wrote**[this op-ed](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ea2/5fca0d19/7de8c4a5/291d70a5/382736014/VEsH/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.stanforddaily.com/2013/01/23/cory-booker-why-have-i-lost-control/")** for the Stanford student newspaper back in 1992 after the Rodney King verdict. Unfortunately, the words I wrote about racial injustice back then still ring true today._

---
PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
---
Cory Booker for Senate
8 Lombardy St
PO Box 346
Newark, NJ 07102

This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you'd like to update your contact information, you can do so **[here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ea2/5fca0d19/7de8c4a5/291d70a4/382736014/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiY2FiLWVtLTIwMDYwNi1lbSJ9/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/cab-update-your-info?source=cab-em-200606-em-footer")**. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe **[here](https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe)**.
---
